title: OperationPlan
description: Schema for CRUD operation plans targeting apply_operation() method in Qorix platform. (c) 2026 Qorix

summary.description: High-level description of the entire operation plan and its purpose
examples: Comprehensive CRUD operation plan for SwcDesign and SignalsComStack models
Batch update operation for vehicle network configuration

ops.description: Ordered array of operations to be executed sequentially. Each operation maps to apply_operation(yaml_in, op_json) parameters.

warnings.description: Array of warning messages about the operation plan execution, validation rules, or constraints
examples: CREATE operations skip validation to allow partial initialization
UPDATE operations require full validation and block on errors
Operations must be executed sequentially for state consistency

Operation.description: Single CRUD operation with all required parameters for apply_operation() method

op_name.description: Unique identifier for the operation using snake_case naming convention

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what this operation does and its expected effect
examples: Create a new field entity in SwcDesign component
Update signal properties like length or byte order
Delete a bus entity from SignalsComStack network

yaml_in.description: YAML-formatted input containing the domain model state (SwcDesign or SignalsComStack). Maps to first parameter of apply_operation(yaml_in, op_json).
examples:
signals_comstack:
  name: "VehicleNetwork"
  version: "1.0.0"
  buses: []
  signals: []
  ipdus: []

op_json.description: JSON-formatted operation specification conforming to UiOpV2 enum structure. Maps to second parameter of apply_operation(yaml_in, op_json). Must be valid JSON containing one of: Create, Update, Delete, or Read operation.

ops.description: Create a new field entity in SwcDesign component

warnings: CREATE operations skip validation to allow partial initialization
Each operation must be executed with result YAML as input to next
